---
id: codespaces-service-compare-session-template
title: "Compare session template"
description: "Returns both the session's template snapshot and the current template configuration for comparison. Used to show what changed when a template is outdated."
sidebar_label: "Compare session template"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: en/bitrise-rde-api/api-reference/bitrise-remote-dev-environments-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Compare session template"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/workspaces/{workspaceId}/sessions/{sessionId}/template-diff"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns both the session's template snapshot and the current template configuration for comparison. Used to show what changed when a template is outdated.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

</Heading>
